ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city center */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "city_website" TEXT /* Official website of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_forces" (
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police force */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the police force operates */,
  "total_officers" INTEGER /* Total number of officers in the police force */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the police force */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the police force was founded */,
  "headquarters_address" TEXT /* Address of the police force headquarters */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the police force */,
  "chief_name" TEXT /* Name of the current police chief */,
  "police_website" TEXT /* Official website of the police force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_police_forces_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_force_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police force department */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the police force department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the police force department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_force_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police force rank */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the police force rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the police force rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer's rank */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the officer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Hire date of the officer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer's department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES police_force_ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES police_force_departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population of the city */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of white officers */,
  "non_white" REAL /* Percentage of non-white officers */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of black officers */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic officers */,
  "asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian officers */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of officers from other racial or ethnic backgrounds */,
  "male" REAL /* Percentage of male officers */,
  "female" REAL /* Percentage of female officers */,
  "age_25-34" REAL /* Percentage of officers aged 25-34 */,
  "age_35-44" REAL /* Percentage of officers aged 35-44 */,
  "age_45-54" REAL /* Percentage of officers aged 45-54 */,
  "age_55-64" REAL /* Percentage of officers aged 55-64 */,
  "age_65_and_older" REAL /* Percentage of officers aged 65 and older */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation entry */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget allocation */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total annual budget allocated to the police force */,
  "salary_expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure on salaries */,
  "training_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for training programs */,
  "community_engagement_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for community engagement initiatives */,
  "equipment_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for equipment and technology */,
  "other_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for other purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the trainer */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community engagement initiative */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the community engagement program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the community engagement program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the program */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, community leader) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., city, police_force, demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who filed the report */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., crime, accident) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)
